value.found_quote: You can test the MCP server using the Responses API directly with a request like this one... "tools": [ { "type": "mcp", "server_label": "cats", "server_url": "https://777ff573-9947-4b9c-8982-658fa40c7d09-00-3le96u7wsymx.janeway.replit.dev/sse/", "allowed_tools": [ "search", "fetch" ], "require_approval": "never" } ]
value.rationale: The page explicitly demonstrates MCP tool integration via the Responses API by providing a working curl example that specifies a remote MCP server as a tool (type: "mcp") directly in the Responses API request body, targeting the "o4-mini-deep-research" model for API-driven deep research. The page also states in the introduction that the guide covers making the MCP server available "via API" for deep research, confirming the claim in full.
